text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara leaves her mark in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As such, we were able to get through those
crucial first three years together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she moves on to the next stage of her career,
Haru Urara is...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! One, two... Phew. I tried my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Running just the same as always.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Aaah, running really feels greats!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I entered so many races! They were all so fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I wondered why that would be. But, duh, it's because I got to run!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I wanna run even more! And win more, too!
choice_data_list: I'll be cheering you on all the way!
I'll be cheering you on all the way!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I want you to be there with me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I run, and you cheer me on! Doesn't that sound
great?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You better keep looking after me, Trainer!
